personalInformation.description: Update your personal information here. Your saved data are used to automatically fill out future applications.

loadFailed.detail: Failed to load personal information. Please try again.

saved.detail: Personal information saved successfully. Changes will be applied to your next application.

saveFailed.detail: Failed to save personal information. Please try again.

submission.title: Application Submission
submission.description: Receive confirmation by email when you submit or withdraw an application.

outcome.title: Application Outcome
outcome.description: Be notified by email when your application is accepted or rejected.

new.title: New Applications
new.description: Get notified by email when a new application is received for your job posting.

accepted.title: Application Accepted (BCC)
accepted.description: Receive a copy by email when an applicant for your job is accepted.

profilePicture.description: Make your profile more personal with a photo.

saved.detail: Your profile picture was updated successfully.

saveFailed.detail: Failed to update your profile picture. Please try again.

deleted.detail: Your profile picture was removed successfully.

deleteFailed.detail: Failed to remove your profile picture. Please try again.

fileTooLarge.detail: Please choose an image smaller than 5 MB.

invalidFileType.detail: Please choose a JPEG, JPG, or PNG image.

resetConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete your current profile picture?

documents.description: Upload and manage your documents here. Your saved documents are used to automatically fill out future applications.

loadFailed.detail: Failed to load documents. Please try again.

saved.detail: Documents saved successfully. Changes will be applied to your next application.

saveFailed.detail: Failed to save documents. Please try again.
